description: Assigned the golf-booking workflow to Rigby as the owning agent. Rigby's domain is platform infrastructure, evolution deployment, and capability building — not recurring personal logistics workflows. The golf booking workflow is an ongoing personal automation that executes a real-world task (booking tee times), not a system operation.
correction: Rigby built the capability correctly, but should not be listed as the owning agent for ongoing execution. Recurring personal lifestyle workflows like golf booking belong to Chief (personal logistics, calendar management, daily ops). Sterling is another candidate if a leisure/lifestyle agent is ever formalized.
systemic_fix: When building a workflow that will execute autonomously on a recurring basis, distinguish between the builder (Rigby) and the operator (the agent whose domain matches the workflow's subject matter). Rigby builds and deploys; Chief or domain agents own execution. Update golf-booking workflow.md to reflect Chief as the owning agent.
